workout.description: 30 min gentle comprehensive session 10 min light foam rolling (calves, hamstrings, glutes) 15 min gentle stretching (focus: recovery) 5 min PTT drills (towel scrunches, toe yoga)
10 min PTT exercises (ankle inversions, arch doming)
25 min Easy (E pace, keep HR <140 bpm)
10 min post-run routine (foam roll calves, hamstrings, glutes)
10 min gentle mobility (standing calf stretch, hip flexor stretch)
15 min evening mobility (PTT drills + gentle stretching)
30 min Easy (E pace, include 4 x 20 sec pickups if feeling good)
15 min post-run recovery (foam rolling + stretching sequence)
40 min comprehensive session 15 min foam rolling (full body sequence) 20 min static stretching (calves, hip flexors, hamstrings, glutes, piriformis) 5 min PTT-specific work (heel raises, arch doming)
12 min PTT-focused session (banded inversions, toe yoga, heel raises)
10 min post-run routine (foam roll + calf/hamstring stretches)
10 min light mobility (hip circles, leg swings, gentle stretches)
30 min Easy + 4 strides (20 sec pickups, easy recovery)
35 min Easy long run (E pace, comfortable effort)
15 min post-long-run recovery (foam rolling + static stretching)
45 min comprehensive session 15 min foam rolling (comprehensive sequence) 25 min static stretching (full lower body + thoracic spine) 5 min PTT drills

PRIMARY Session #1 - Lower Body + Core (45-50 min) Warmup: 10 min (bike/walk, hip circles, leg swings, bodyweight squats) A1. Goblet Squat: 3 × 12-15 reps A2. Single-Leg RDL: 3 × 10-12 per leg B1. Bulgarian Split Squat: 3 × 10-12 per leg B2. Forearm Plank: 3 × 30-45 sec C1. Pallof Press: 3 × 12-15 per side C2. Single-Leg Calf Raise: 3 × 15-20 per leg
35 min Easy with 6 strides at end (20 sec pickups)

LIGHT Session #1 - Upper Body + Core (30-35 min) Warmup: 5 min easy movement A1. Bent-Over Row (dumbbells): 3 × 12-15 reps A2. Goblet Squat (light): 3 × 12 reps B1. Dead Bug: 3 × 10 per side B2. Bird Dog: 3 × 10 per side C1. Glute Bridge: 3 × 15 reps C2. Standing Calf Raise: 3 × 20 reps
40 min Easy long run (E pace, build aerobic base)
50 min comprehensive session 15 min foam rolling (full body) 30 min static stretching + yoga (emphasis: hips, hamstrings, calves) 5 min PTT drills

PRIMARY Session #2 - Lower Body + Core (45-50 min) Warmup: 10 min A1. Goblet Squat: 3 × 12-15 reps (slight load increase from last week) A2. Single-Leg RDL: 3 × 10-12 per leg B1. Walking Lunge: 3 × 12 per leg B2. Side Plank (forearms): 3 × 30 sec per side C1. Pallof Press: 3 × 12-15 per side C2. Eccentric Calf Raise: 3 × 8-10 per leg (3 sec lower)
30 min Easy (keep very easy, holiday schedule)
REST or 20-30 min easy social run

LIGHT Session #2 - Upper Body + Core (30-35 min) Warmup: 5 min A1. Bent-Over Row: 3 × 12-15 reps A2. Step-Up: 3 × 10 per leg B1. Dead Bug: 3 × 12 per side B2. Quadruped Hip Extension: 3 × 12 per side C1. Glute Bridge (single-leg): 3 × 10 per leg C2. Calf Raise: 3 × 20 reps
50 min Easy long run (E pace, ~4.7 miles)
50 min comprehensive session 15 min foam rolling 30 min stretching/yoga (emphasis: recovery from long run) 5 min PTT drills

PRIMARY Session #3 - Lower Body + Core (45-50 min) Warmup: 10 min A1. Goblet Squat: 3 × 12-15 reps A2. Single-Leg RDL: 3 × 10-12 per leg B1. Bulgarian Split Squat: 3 × 10-12 per leg B2. Forearm Plank (with hip extension): 3 × 40 sec C1. Pallof Press (with step): 3 × 12 per side C2. Single-Leg Eccentric Calf: 3 × 10 per leg
REST or 30 min easy celebration run

LIGHT Session #3 - Upper Body + Core (30-35 min) Warmup: 5 min A1. Bent-Over Row: 3 × 12-15 reps A2. Goblet Squat: 3 × 12 reps B1. Dead Bug (with leg extension): 3 × 12 per side B2. Bird Dog (with hold): 3 × 10 per side (3 sec hold) C1. Glute Bridge (single-leg): 3 × 12 per leg C2. Calf Raise: 3 × 20 reps
60 min Easy long run (E pace, ~5.7 miles - building aerobic base)
50 min comprehensive session 15 min foam rolling 30 min stretching/yoga 5 min PTT drills

PRIMARY Session #4 - Lower + Core (45-50 min) Move to 8-12 rep range, increased load Warmup: 10 min A1. Goblet Squat: 4 × 8-10 reps (heavier) A2. Single-Leg RDL: 4 × 8-10 per leg (heavier) B1. Bulgarian Split Squat: 3 × 10 per leg B2. Side Plank with Leg Raise: 3 × 25 sec per side C1. Pallof Press (with rotation): 3 × 10 per side C2. Single-Leg Eccentric Calf: 3 × 10 per leg
30 min Easy AM (before work, E pace 10:04-10:30/mile)
40 min Progression Run (work fitness time ~0715) 10 min Easy warmup 20 min build from E pace to M pace (finish at 9:10/mile) 10 min Easy cooldown
10 min post-run routine (focus: legs, gentle stretching)

LIGHT Session #4 - Upper + Core (30-35 min) Warmup: 5 min A1. Bent-Over Row: 3 × 10-12 reps A2. Step-Up (tempo): 3 × 8 per leg B1. Dead Bug (extended): 3 × 12 per side B2. Bird Dog (opposite reach): 3 × 10 per side C1. Single-Leg Glute Bridge: 3 × 12 per leg C2. Calf Raise: 3 × 20 reps
70 min Easy long run (E pace, ~6.6 miles - steady aerobic effort)
55 min comprehensive session 20 min foam rolling (comprehensive sequence) 30 min stretching/yoga (recovery-focused) 5 min PTT drills

PRIMARY Session #5 - Lower + Core (45-50 min) Warmup: 10 min A1. Goblet Squat: 4 × 8-10 reps A2. Single-Leg RDL: 4 × 8-10 per leg B1. Walking Lunge (weighted): 3 × 12 per leg B2. Forearm Plank (with alternating leg lift): 3 × 40 sec C1. Pallof Press (with step): 3 × 10 per side C2. Eccentric Calf Raise: 3 × 10 per leg
TEMPO WORKOUT #1 (work fitness time) 10 min Easy warmup 2 × 8 min at T pace (8:27/mile, HR 160-170 bpm) 3 min Easy recovery jog between reps 10 min Easy cooldown

LIGHT Session #5 - Upper + Core (30-35 min) Warmup: 5 min A1. Bent-Over Row: 3 × 10-12 reps A2. Goblet Squat (light): 3 × 10 reps B1. Dead Bug: 3 × 12 per side B2. Bird Dog: 3 × 10 per side C1. Single-Leg Glute Bridge: 3 × 12 per leg C2. Calf Raise: 3 × 20 reps
80 min Easy long run (E pace, ~7.5 miles - steady build)
55 min comprehensive session 20 min foam rolling 30 min stretching/yoga (recovery emphasis after tempo week) 5 min PTT drills

PRIMARY Session #6 - Lower + Core (45-50 min) Warmup: 10 min A1. Goblet Squat: 4 × 8-10 reps A2. Single-Leg RDL: 4 × 8-10 per leg B1. Bulgarian Split Squat: 3 × 10 per leg B2. Side Plank (weighted): 3 × 30 sec per side C1. Pallof Press (with rotation): 3 × 10 per side C2. Single-Leg Eccentric Calf: 3 × 10 per leg
TEMPO WORKOUT #2 (work fitness time) 10 min Easy warmup 3 × 7 min at T pace (8:27/mile, HR 160-170) 2.5 min Easy recovery between reps 10 min Easy cooldown

LIGHT Session #6 - Upper + Core (30-35 min) Warmup: 5 min A1. Bent-Over Row: 3 × 10-12 reps A2. Step-Up: 3 × 8 per leg B1. Dead Bug (extended): 3 × 12 per side B2. Bird Dog (with hold): 3 × 10 per side C1. Single-Leg Glute Bridge: 3 × 12 per leg C2. Calf Raise: 3 × 20 reps
90 min Easy long run (E pace, ~8.5 miles - building endurance)
20 min post-long-run recovery (extended for longer run)
60 min comprehensive session (extra recovery for peak phase) 20 min foam rolling (thorough full body) 35 min stretching/yoga (emphasis: recovery) 5 min PTT drills

PRIMARY Session #7 - Maintenance (35-40 min) Warmup: 8 min A1. Goblet Squat: 3 × 8 reps (maintain load, reduce volume) A2. Single-Leg RDL: 3 × 8 per leg B1. Bulgarian Split Squat: 2 × 8 per leg B2. Forearm Plank: 2 × 40 sec C1. Pallof Press: 2 × 10 per side C2. Single-Leg Calf: 2 × 10 per leg
12 min evening PTT session (extra attention with increased running load)
TEMPO WORKOUT #3 (work fitness time) 10 min Easy warmup 20 min continuous at T pace (8:27/mile, HR 160-170) 10 min Easy cooldown

LIGHT Session #7 - Minimal (20-25 min) Warmup: 5 min A1. Bent-Over Row: 2 × 10 reps A2. Goblet Squat: 2 × 8 reps B1. Dead Bug: 2 × 10 per side B2. Glute Bridge: 2 × 12 reps C1. Calf Raise: 2 × 15 reps
100 min Easy long run (~9.5 miles - E pace, stay comfortable)
20 min post-long-run recovery (extended time for peak volume)
60 min comprehensive session 20 min foam rolling 35 min stretching/yoga (prepare for HM pace work) 5 min PTT drills

PRIMARY Session #8 - Maintenance (35-40 min) Warmup: 8 min A1. Goblet Squat: 3 × 8 reps A2. Single-Leg RDL: 3 × 8 per leg B1. Walking Lunge: 2 × 10 per leg B2. Side Plank: 2 × 30 sec per side C1. Pallof Press: 2 × 10 per side C2. Eccentric Calf: 2 × 10 per leg
HALF MARATHON PACE WORKOUT (work fitness time) 10 min Easy warmup 2 × 12 min at B-goal HM pace (8:33/mile, HR 155-165) 3 min Easy recovery jog between reps 10 min Easy cooldown

LIGHT Session #8 - Minimal (20-25 min) Warmup: 5 min A1. Bent-Over Row: 2 × 10 reps A2. Step-Up: 2 × 8 per leg B1. Dead Bug: 2 × 10 per side B2. Single-Leg Glute Bridge: 2 × 10 per leg C1. Calf Raise: 2 × 15 reps
110 min Easy long run (~10.5 miles - PEAK LONG RUN)
60 min comprehensive session 20 min foam rolling 35 min stretching/yoga (begin preparing for taper) 5 min PTT drills

PRIMARY Session #9 - Maintenance (35-40 min) Warmup: 8 min A1. Goblet Squat: 3 × 8 reps A2. Single-Leg RDL: 3 × 8 per leg B1. Bulgarian Split Squat: 2 × 8 per leg B2. Forearm Plank: 2 × 40 sec C1. Pallof Press: 2 × 10 per side C2. Single-Leg Calf: 2 × 10 per leg
INTERVAL WORKOUT (work fitness time) 10 min Easy warmup 6 × 3 min at I pace (7:55/mile, HR 170-180) 2 min Easy recovery jog between reps 10 min Easy cooldown

LIGHT Session #9 - Minimal (20-25 min) Warmup: 5 min A1. Bent-Over Row: 2 × 10 reps A2. Goblet Squat: 2 × 8 reps B1. Dead Bug: 2 × 10 per side B2. Glute Bridge: 2 × 12 reps C1. Calf Raise: 2 × 15 reps

90 min Easy long run (~8.5 miles - cutback week before taper) E pace (10:20-10:40/mile), stay relaxed This cutback allows recovery from last week's peak while maintaining fitness 1 week before race - perfect for final long effort
45 min comprehensive session (final major mobility before race) 15 min foam rolling (gentle, no deep work) 25 min stretching/yoga (focus: relaxation, flexibility) 5 min PTT drills
25 min Easy recovery AM (very light, keep legs fresh)
NO STRENGTH - allow full recovery for race week
REST or 20 min very easy jog (optional)
RACE PREP WORKOUT (work fitness time) 10 min Easy warmup 6 × 30 sec at I pace (7:55/mile) with 90 sec jog recovery 10 min Easy cooldown
15 min gentle stretching + PTT drills (keep relaxed)
20 min Easy shakeout + 4 × 20 sec pickups Very light effort, just activate legs Keep HR below 140 bpm
10 min gentle mobility (hip circles, leg swings, light stretches)
